idea-plugin.name: Flutter Skill - AI App Automation
idea-plugin.description:
Give your AI Agent eyes and hands inside your Flutter app

Flutter Skill creates a bi-directional control channel between AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.) and running Flutter applications through the Dart VM Service Protocol.

Key Features

UI Inspection (25+ Tools)

  • Widget Tree Analysis - Explore the complete widget hierarchy with depth control
  • Interactive Elements - Find buttons, text fields, and other actionable widgets
  • Element Properties - Get size, position, visibility, and state information
  • Text Extraction - Extract all visible text content from the screen
  • Find by Type - Locate widgets by their type (ElevatedButton, TextField, etc.)

Interactions

  • Tap & Click - Single tap, double tap, and long press gestures
  • Text Entry - Enter text into text fields programmatically
  • Gestures - Swipe (up/down/left/right), drag, and scroll operations
  • Navigation - Go back, view navigation stack, get current route

State & Validation

  • State Queries - Get text field values, checkbox states, slider values
  • Wait Conditions - Wait for elements to appear or disappear (with timeout)
  • Screenshots - Capture full app or specific element screenshots (base64 PNG)

Development Tools

  • Hot Reload - Trigger hot reload remotely
  • Logs & Errors - View application logs and error messages
  • Performance - Monitor performance metrics
  • pub.dev Search - Search packages directly from the agent

Zero Configuration Setup

Simply run flutter_skill launch /path/to/project and the tool automatically:

  1. Adds the flutter_skill dependency if missing
  2. Patches main.dart with initialization code
  3. Launches the app and captures the VM Service URI
  4. Saves connection info for subsequent commands

MCP Server Integration

Works seamlessly with MCP-compatible AI agents. Add to your MCP configuration:

{
  "flutter-skill": {
    "command": "flutter-skill",
    "args": ["server"]
  }
}

Installation Options

  • pub.dev: dart pub global activate flutter_skill
  • Homebrew: brew install ai-dashboad/flutter-skill/flutter-skill
  • npm: npx flutter-skill-mcp

Links

  • GitHub Repository
  • pub.dev Package
  • npm Package
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.1

  • Added plugin icon
  • Enhanced plugin description with detailed feature documentation

0.2.0

  • Initial release with 25+ MCP tools
  • UI inspection: widget tree, interactive elements, text content
  • Interactions: tap, double tap, long press, swipe, drag, scroll, enter text
  • State validation: text values, checkbox state, slider value
  • Wait conditions: wait for element, wait for gone
  • Screenshots: full app and element-specific capture
  • Navigation: routes, navigation stack, go back
  • Debug tools: logs, errors, performance metrics, hot reload
  • Zero-config setup with auto-patching

action.description: Launch Flutter app with Flutter Skill
Start MCP server for AI agents
